questions.question:
In a computer network using CSMA/CD, the minimum frame size for data transfer is \( 1500 \) bytes. What will be the data transfer speed in this network over \( 1 \) Km \( 375 \) cable, if the signal speed in the cable is \( 250000 \mathrm{Km} / \mathrm{sec} \) and no repeaters are used in this network?



Computer Networks: ISRO CSE 2023 | Question: 45
